name: Rohan Khatri
tagline: SOC-focused cybersecurity undergrad. I build detection labs, investigate attacks, and document everything.
about: BSc Computer Science for Cyber Security at Oxford Brookes University. Building a SOC analyst skillset the practical way: home detection labs, blue-team investigations, and hands-on labs across TryHackMe and Hack The Box. Aiming for a Sept 2027 placement.
